must_detect.matched_text:
Strictly Private & Confidential — Not for exchange portal; Internal use only.
Board/Compliance memo: OceanLattice Holdings Ltd. (Mainboard-listed, Singapore) — Project Kestrel — indicative SPA terms with Ambernova Tech Pte. Ltd.
Prepared by Ms. Alina Quek, Partner, Linden Law Chambers LLP; contact: compliance@lindenlaw.sg, +65 6123 7788.
Targeted signing of definitive Share Purchase Agreement on 15 Jul 2026, with embargo on any market announcement until 16 Jul 2026, 07:30 SGT (Listing Manual Rule 703).
Purchase consideration S$128,000,000 for 68% of issued shares, with earn‑out up to S$12,000,000; financed via private placement of up to 9.5% new shares subject to regulatory and exchange clearance.
MAC/MAE: parties agree no Material Adverse Change has occurred since 31 Mar 2026, and MAC excludes pandemics, interest rate shifts, or market-wide events.
Employment/HR: retention letters for six Key Employees, garden leave mechanics, and PDPA-compliant notices for transfer of employee personal data to our data intermediary under Clause 24.
Data room hygiene: only hashed NRIC fields to be visible; do not email CVs; maintain insider list and pre-close trading blackout as per SFA Part XII and Listing Manual Practice Note 7.1.
Investor relations draft: if consummated, expected EPS accretion c. 6.2% in FY2027; back-up Q&A references only public-source materials (e.g., 2024 product catalogue and 2023 sustainability report).
Note that the last traded price on 12 Jul 2026 was S$1.42 per share (public information from the exchange website), and we do not guide on price or timing.
Compliance checklist: DPIA under PDPA completed, vendor due diligence clean, no whistleblower allegations, and embargo distribution list limited to ExCo and advisers; avoid leak risks.
for monday’s stand-up: update the cap-table annexures, refresh board bios, and confirm data retention schedule by fri eod.
Research note (internal): comparable transactions indicate median EV/EBITDA 11.3x; we are not aware of any MNPI beyond this memo and the term sheet.
IR coordination: draft exchange announcement subject to legal sign-off; if a leak occurs, prepare holding statement referencing a general strategic review initiated in Q1 2026 (previously disclosed).
Wellness: team offsite tentatively includes a spa day at the Marina South retreat after signing; do not include in budget pack circulated to the Board.
This memorandum is confidential and not price-sensitive in isolation; however, combined with timing/percentage data it could reasonably be expected to influence market behaviour, so treat as MNPI.
